summary: Re-validated tech-spec.md against codebase after round-1 fixes. Round-1 fixes verified: Task 3 file path now correctly points to core/data/Config.kt (ConfigKeys lives there at line 40); task numbering compacted to 1-10. All factual code claims (file paths, function names, line numbers, dependency versions, ConfigKeys.MAX_TOKENS, EngineConfig.maxNumTokens, ConversationConfig+SamplerConfig at LlmChatModelHelper.kt:124-142, ChatViewModel.kt:1518 MAX_TOKENS reference, lastByChat at line 744, ChatScreen comment at line 329, ALLOWED_COMPONENTS=14, ErrorLog.e()-only) confirmed against the actual code. Two narrative inconsistencies found about wave structure but they are documentation cohesion issues — not code mirages. No critical findings; tech-spec is factually accurate vs codebase.

findings.claim: tech-spec line 260: 'ChatViewModel.kt is touched by Tasks 3 and 5 — they sit in different waves to serialise. ChatScreen.kt is touched only by Task 5'
findings.reality: Per the explicit 'Files to modify' lists: Task 3 modifies ChatViewModel.kt; Task 5 modifies patterns.md only (no Kotlin files); Task 6 modifies BOTH ChatViewModel.kt AND ChatScreen.kt. The narrative incorrectly attributes Task 5's role to docs vs code. Correct statement: ChatViewModel.kt is touched by Tasks 3 and 6 (different waves); ChatScreen.kt is touched only by Task 6.
findings.source: tech-spec.md, line 260, opening paragraph of '## Implementation Tasks'
findings.fix: Replace 'touched by Tasks 3 and 5' with 'touched by Tasks 3 and 6' and 'ChatScreen.kt is touched only by Task 5' with 'ChatScreen.kt is touched only by Task 6'.

findings.claim: tech-spec line 282 (Wave 2 intro): 'Tasks 3, 6, 7 in parallel — disjoint file sets. Task 3 owns ChatViewModel.kt for this wave.'
findings.reality: Wave 2 contains Tasks 3, 4, 5 (per the actual #### Task headings on lines 284, 292, 300). Task 6 is in Wave 3 (line 307) and Task 7 is the Code Audit in the Audit Wave (line 319). Orchestrator's round-1 brief explicitly stated 'Wave 2 (Tasks 3,4,5 parallel), Wave 3 (Task 6)' — the wave-intro text was not updated to match.
findings.source: tech-spec.md, line 282, paragraph under '### Wave 2 — Bug 1 wiring + edge-to-edge + docs'
findings.fix: Replace 'Tasks 3, 6, 7 in parallel' with 'Tasks 3, 4, 5 in parallel'.

findings.claim: tech-spec line 310 (Task 6 description): 'Also remove the now-stale comment in ChatScreen.kt (the line about MainActivity setting decorFitsSystemWindows — becomes implicit after Task 6).'
findings.reality: Self-referential — Task 6 is itself this task. The comment at ChatScreen.kt:329-330 'WindowCompat.setDecorFitsSystemWindows(window, false) already set by MainActivity' becomes correct (not stale) after Task 4's enableEdgeToEdge() lands in MainActivity. Reference should point to Task 4, not Task 6.
findings.fix: Replace 'becomes implicit after Task 6' with 'becomes implicit after Task 4'.

findings.claim: tech-spec line 197: 'replace existing assertEquals(14, ALLOWED_COMPONENTS.size) with 15'
findings.reality: ErrorLogTest.kt:61 actual code is `assertEquals("expected 14 allowed components", 14, allowed.size)` — uses message-first overload and a local `allowed` reference, not `ALLOWED_COMPONENTS.size` directly. Intent is clear; cosmetic mismatch only.
findings.source: tech-spec.md, line 197 (Testing Strategy, ErrorLogTest extend section)
findings.fix: Optional: rephrase to 'update existing 14-allowed-components assertion at ErrorLogTest.kt:61 to expect 15'.

verified_claims: ModelRegistry.resetConversation(modelName, systemPrompt) signature confirmed (no reason param yet — Task 1 will add)
ErrorLog.kt exposes only e() — i()/w() do NOT exist (Decision 5 accurate)
MainActivity.kt has setContent at line 34, no enableEdgeToEdge()
CrashReportActivity.kt has FLAG_SECURE at line 83 + setContent at line 86
ChatViewModel.LIGHT_FIELD_LABELS at line 1514 with MAX_TOKENS at line 1518
ChatViewModel.lastByChat call at line 744 (matches Decision 2 claim)
ChatScreen.kt: topAppBarState is TopAppBarState.Ready at line 279
Round-1 fix: Task 3 reads core/data/Config.kt (correct path) — was previously wrongly ConfigKeys.kt
Round-1 fix: Tasks compacted to 1-10 — verified all 10 task headings present
ChatViewModel commitDraft at line 911 + NavigateToPersistent emit at line 988
